message.content:
@startuml
participant "Admin" as Admin
participant "AddEventPage" as AddEventPage
participant "AddEventFormContainer" as AddEventFormContainer
participant "AddClassPopupContainer" as AddClassPopupContainer
participant "ClassForm" as ClassForm
participant "ClassService (Frontend)" as ClassService
participant "ShiftService (Frontend)" as ShiftService
participant "Router" as Router
participant "ClassHTTPTransport" as ClassHTTPTransport
participant "ClassEndpoint" as ClassEndpoint
participant "ClassService" as ClassService2
participant "ClassCommand" as ClassCommand
participant "ClassQuery" as ClassQuery
participant "TransactionGRPCTransport" as TransactionGRPCTransport
participant "StorageGRPCTransport" as StorageGRPCTransport
participant "MaterialService" as MaterialService
participant "NatsStreaming" as NatsStreaming

Actor Admin
rectangle "AddEventPage" {
    AddEventPage
}
rectangle "AddEventFormContainer" {
    AddEventFormContainer
}
rectangle "AddClassPopupContainer" {
    AddClassPopupContainer
}
rectangle "ClassForm" {
    ClassForm
}
rectangle "ClassService (Frontend)" {
    ClassService
}
rectangle "ShiftService (Frontend)" {
    ShiftService
}
rectangle "Router" {
    Router
}
rectangle "ClassHTTPTransport" {
    ClassHTTPTransport
}
rectangle "ClassEndpoint" {
    ClassEndpoint
}
rectangle "ClassService" {
    ClassService
}
rectangle "ClassCommand" {
    ClassCommand
}
rectangle "ClassQuery" {
    ClassQuery
}
rectangle "TransactionGRPCTransport" {
    TransactionGRPCTransport
}
rectangle "StorageGRPCTransport" {
    StorageGRPCTransport
}
rectangle "MaterialService" {
    MaterialService
}
rectangle "NatsStreaming" {
    NatsStreaming
}

rectangle "alt [\"Data Valid\"]" {
    ClassService2
}
rectangle "alt [\"%s Valid Transaction\"]" {
    ClassService2
}
rectangle "opt [\"has materials\"]" {
    ClassHTTPTransport
    ClassHTTPTransport
